message:
docs(readme): add Homebrew package manager installation option

Add alternative installation method via Homebrew tap for macOS/Linux
users who prefer managed installs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,12 @@ curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/repo_updater/mai # You can omit the `?ru_cb=...` once installed; it's just a cache-buster for the installer fetch. ``` +**Or via Homebrew (macOS/Linux):** + +```bash +brew install dicklesworthstone/tap/ru +``` +

---
